title: addword.py silently returns blank pronunciation on scrape failure
body: get_pronunciations() in tools/addword.py has a bare except that swallows any error from parsing youdao.com, so running addword.py <word> prints a table row with empty pronunciation fields instead of a clear failure when the page layout changes.

title: Chromium extension only recognizes a fixed set of search engines
body: js/app/search-engine.js hardcodes the list of search engine URL patterns it matches, so using the extension while searching on other providers never triggers the wrong-pronunciation lookup overlay.

title: format-code.sh has no usage instructions
body: tools/chromium_extension/format-code.sh isn't mentioned in any docs, so contributors don't know it's expected to be run before committing changes to the extension's JS files.
